label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 13

extraction.one_line_summary: SÉNÉCHAL Florian won Stage 13 sprint after JAKOBSEN Fabio lost position in late turns and suffered suspected puncture.
tactical_patterns: Positioning battle intensified before 3.2km due to turns/roundabouts near 3km safety line mixing GC teams with sprinters.
KRIEGER Alexander led out expecting MODOLO behind but sprinted when teammate missing, revealing Quick-Step train disorganization.
Crosswind threat after turn caused peloton to briefly accelerate and close breakaway gap despite no actual wind materializing.

rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: negative: Lost position in late turns before 3km line, suspected puncture ruined lead-out positioning
rider_signals.SÉNÉCHAL Florian: positive: Capitalized when Quick-Step lead-out train broke down, beat TRENTIN on throw
rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: neutral: Second consecutive stage working hard for near-miss sprint result shows consistency without firepower
rider_signals.EIKING Odd Christian: neutral: Retained GC lead but faces mountain stages where team duty to MEINTJES may conflict
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: Shaking head crossing line mixed in peloton suggests frustration with positioning effort for flat stage
